The '''New Republic Fifth Fleet''', originally activated as the '''Fifth Roving Battle Group''' and also known as the '''Fifth Defense Task Force''', was the first fleet of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] comprised entirely of [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] starships. Originally activated as a rapid reaction command, the Fifth Roving Battle Group fought under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] of [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], earning itself the nickname "Fighting Fifth" and assignment to full fleet status. By [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the Fifth Fleet numbered some five hundred [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and thousands of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in five [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the Fifth Fleet was reorganized along with the rest of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Forces]], becoming the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]].

==Operational History==
[[File:Battle_of_Doornik-319.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing bombers]] during the [[Battle of Doornik-319]].]]
Originally consisting of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]], the Fifth Fleet was commissioned in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] as the Fifth Roving Battle Group and placed under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]. A'baht commanded the fleet from [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']]. The Fifth Battle Group was activated in response to concerns that the four older fleets of the New Republic Navy had become tied down in territorial deployments and the New Republic lacked a rapid reaction force.<ref name="TEGTW" /> However, after its creation, the Fifth Battle Group caused a political stir among some [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|senators]] who feared that it would be used as a tool of conquest.

The Fifth Battle Group saw heavy action in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], and took losses in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] and subsequent [[Battle of N'zoth]]. Following the battle, the Fifth oversaw the pacification of [[N'zoth]] and the broken [[Duskhan League]]. In the aftermath of the Black Fleet Crisis, the "Fighting Fifth" was rapidly assigned full fleet status.<ref name="TEGTW" />

The Fifth Fleet was joined by the [[New Republic Third Fleet]] in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] campaign against the [[Imperial Remnant]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], culminating in the [[Battle of Anx Minor]]. After A'baht left the fleet, its command was taken up by his friend, [[Kiles L'toth]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the year of [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace]] with the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Fifth Fleet had been enlarged to full strength, with five hundred [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] organized into five [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]], with thousands of starfighters.<ref name="TEGTW" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Fifth Fleet was initially positioned between [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] and [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. It was tasked with the defense of important [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core systems]] after the fall of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]]. Following the New Republic's reformation into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], it later became the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]].

==Organization==
The Fifth Fleet, before [[Operation Hammerblow]], contained 106 starships and was divided into five task forces of approximately twenty-one vessels each, although operational constraints caused their numbers to fluctuate. Each task force included one [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]] or [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] at its point, two [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruisers]], two [[Defender-class assault carrier|''Defender''-class assault carriers]], four [[Sacheen-class light escort|''Sacheen''-class escort frigates]] and five [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunships]]. It can be assumed that a number of [[Agave-class picket ship|''Agave''-class pickets]] and at least two [[Hajen-class fleet tender|''Hajen''-class fleet tenders]] were also assigned to each task force.

After the disastrous [[Battle of Doornik-319]], the Fifth Battle Group was reinforced by 133 more warships from the [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third]], [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth]], and [[New Republic Second Fleet|Second Fleets]].

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the Fifth Fleet had been enlarged to full strength, with five hundred [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] organized into five [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]], with thousands of starfighters.<ref name="TEGTW" />
